fonts.name: Montserrat ExtraBold
fonts.why_selected: Frequently recommended for short-form subtitles and cited as a go-to TikTok caption font.

fonts.name: Bebas Neue
fonts.why_selected: Repeatedly recommended for TikTok and Shorts text because the tall all-caps shape grabs attention fast.

fonts.name: Anton
fonts.why_selected: Common for loud all-caps short-form caption styles, including the widely copied Hormozi-style subtitle look.

fonts.name: Komika Axis
fonts.license_note: Publicly distributed as personal-use freeware. Check licensing before commercial/shipped use.
fonts.why_selected: Commonly identified as the MrBeast subtitle font and heavily copied in fast-paced YouTube/TikTok caption styles.
